channel.title: glibc Code Reading on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in glibc Code Reading on Memo

item.title: glibc printf
item.description: Version # glibc v2.35 Definition1 # // stdio-common/printf.c int __printf (const char *format, ...) { va_list arg; int done; va_start (arg, format); done = __vfprintf_internal (stdout, format, arg, 0); va_end (arg); return done; } #undef _IO_printf ldbl_strong_alias (__printf, printf); ldbl_strong_alias (__printf, _IO_printf); // stdio-common/vfprintf-internal.c # define vfprintf __vfprintf_internal ... int vfprintf (FILE *s, const CHAR_T *format, va_list ap, unsigned int mode_flags) { ... /* Hand off processing for positional parameters.
